arts.ttl: Marinakis brings in super-agent as bridge to work on purchase – Nottingham Forest owner’s network growing
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis has brought in Brazilian agent Giuliano Bertolucci to help with his attempted purchase of Vasco. That’s according to journalist Bruno Andrade, who reports that Marinakis has now added Bertolucci to proceedings alongside Edu Gaspar as he looks to expand his network. Man City vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Nottingham Forest in the Premier League this evening, bidding to get their faltering fortunes back on track. Pep Guardiola’s side are without a win in seven games and have lost four consecutive fixtures in the Premier League. It’s the first time Guardiola has endured such a run in his managerial career. arts.ttl: Man City vs Nottingham Forest – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome Nottingham Forest to the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday night with the hosts in desperate need of a victory. City find themselves in a perilous predicament having not triumphed for seven matches in all competitions. Meanwhile, Forest continue to exceed expectations as they currently sit in sixth position, one of the coveted European […] The post Man City vs Nottingham Forest – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Can Man City end losing run against Nottingham Forest?
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's match, Guardiola said: “They [his players] want it - I know they want it every single day – I don’t have any doubts, but we are not getting results, and we have to get results, and this is the reality. Man City's run of four consecutive Premier League losses, and seven matches without a win in all competitions, has been well-documented, as has the fact is the worst sequence of Pep Guardiola's managerial career.

arts.ttl: Manchester City transfer news: Rodri would welcome Spain teammate to Premier League champions
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri suggests that he would welcome one of his Spain teammates to the Etihad Stadium with open arms.
